name: Responsive Design
description: Build layouts that work across breakpoints with intentional mobile and desktop behavior.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill responsive-design -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill responsive-design -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill responsive-design -a codex -g -y
